<!--
Thanks for contributing to Envoy!

PR title format: <type>(<optional-scope>): <short description>
Examples:
  feat(shareFile): add file size warning before upload
  fix(crypto): correct IV length to match Enclosed app-client
-->

## What changed

<!-- A short summary of the change, in plain English. One or two sentences is usually enough. -->

## Why

<!-- The motivation. Link the issue if there is one: "Closes #123" or "Relates to #456". -->

## How to test

<!-- Step-by-step instructions a reviewer can follow to verify this works.
     For UI changes, include screenshots or a short clip if possible. -->

1.
2.
3.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests (or the PR description explains why it isn't)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` if the change is user-visible
- [ ] No real secrets, tokens, or `.env` contents committed
- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
